creator: maslanbsd@gmail.com
text:
After updating from 7.0-BETA3 to 7.0-BETA4, it seems there is a bug in
the ATAPI or ATAPICAM driver.

When burning a CD-R using cdrecord i got:
#cdrecord -v dev=2,0,0 7.0-RC1-i386-disc2.iso

cdrecord: No write mode specified.
cdrecord: Asuming -tao mode.
cdrecord: Future versions of cdrecord may have different drive dependent defaults.
cdrecord: Continuing in 5 seconds...

I always find a lot of error messages in dmesg like that:
acd0: FAILURE - WRITE_BIG MEDIUM ERROR asc=0x0c ascq=0x00
